action.reasoning: Observation: the last trial above the local optimum (0.34125/0.2275/0.43125) dropped to balanced_accuracy 0.6589, while the best checkpoint remains the 0.345/0.230/0.425 DINO 3-model ensemble with balanced_accuracy 0.6609. Analysis: remaining_iterations is 1, so further exploration risks ending without explicitly resubmitting the best model. Decision: submit the known best checkpoint checkpoints/dino_ens_4_10_s123_w345230425.pt with the existing predict.py as the final evaluation.
